PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Johanna Fogl (Executor).

The Court asked Mr. Bresler if the Petitioner is the sole beneficiary of the trust and if anyone has contacted him since the last declaration was filed. Mr. Bresler stated that the Petitioner is not the sole beneficiary of the trust, that two individuals received specific gifts and are identified in the declaration, and that they were the source of any other existing heirs. Ms. Bresler also stated that no one has contacted him since filing of the last declaration and that has received not one single call from anyone. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for October 18, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.
